items.title: [负面] I do love me a lovecraftian game every once in a w...
items.summary:
I do love me a lovecraftian game every once in a while, but that doesn't excuse the following:

FOMO Gacha packs literally telling me that I have 6hours or 2days or whatever to get a small amount of currency for a game I haven't even sunk my teeth into. Even better, I get slapped in the face with it every time I log in. Take me out to dinner first if you want me bent over that badly.

The story has this irritating way of delivering sentences that cuts off what you're reading halfway through it. If it happened once every 30-60 minutes, like other story-intensive games, I'd be cool with it. Not here, this happens every few sentences. Disjointing the reading experience denys the joy in reading, if that makes sense. Auto-speed was insanely quick, but hold on to the screen while clicking will fastforward the dialogue?? Why?!

I wasn't able to progress much further through the game before being booted off for maintenance today. 8pm in my timezone on a Sunday. I don't really get much time to play games these days (hence why I bother with Gacha), but getting booted right as I'm trying to enjoy the game is a good sign this ain't for me.

Otherwise, I would say everything else was fine. Gameplay, music, art-style, combat, all of that was good. I wouldn't say I recommend this game to the average gacha player. Only to those who really like this niche. From my own judgement, this is a low-spenditure gacha, so it will likely be around for as long as GFL1 was. Good luck, y'all.

items.title: [正面] Good art and music. I have zero experience with ca...
items.summary:
Good art and music. I have zero experience with card games but the gameplay in this one is pretty fun, for a gacha anyway. 

The interface is a bit unresponsive and clunky though. It's fine on mobile but doesn't feel nice to use with a mouse.

items.title:
[负面] 剧情我认为在二游里算非常不错的了，
大概一整天下来能看完一个单元剧情。
（并非一章，而是指雾都和...
items.summary:
剧情我认为在二游里算非常不错的了，
大概一整天下来能看完一个单元剧情。
（并非一章，而是指雾都和神国区域的事情）
内容比较紧凑，对话里重要信息占比和脉络也非常不错。
花个二三十买个自抽号把忘却篇的主线全部迅速看完我很推荐，
当然b站找视频也行，持续玩下去不太建议。

福利还行，但是平衡不行，
同时因为玩的人少，
游戏里部分地方引导不做好，
有些刁钻的问题靠百度和wiki不一定搜得到。
加上国内二游圈子和Q群的氛围不好，
加群也不一定得到解决，
因为都在玩那些个烂梗和小团体话题而顾不上你，
我的评价是不常用discord的，
不喜欢加群掺和，
对体验坐牢不知道怎么解决，
得不到及时反馈很在意的，
建议别碰。
因为到后面肯定会有一堆比如：
伤害的计算公式，
跃迁等机制，
甚至一些更日常的问题，
比如新出个礼包98有+12命轮，
你不知道强度如何，能用到什么时候等等这些。

如果有个身边很熟的人带着你，
能正常解答疑问的朋友，
我觉得可以试一试。
如果没有建议三思而后行，尤其是氪金，
校猫随便搜下就知道不是啥好鸟，
尤其是被1999气过来的玩家，
劝告一句这边也好不到哪去。
同时因为玩的人少，
自主解决问题（搜视频，查wiki，看论坛攻略等）
这方面的体验还不如9。

items.title:
[负面] 本来是对回合制卡牌来的，结果却如此令人失望。
数值无比膨胀、资源无比稀缺、剧情无比单调、运营无比愚蠢...
items.summary:
本来是对回合制卡牌来的，结果却如此令人失望。
数值无比膨胀、资源无比稀缺、剧情无比单调、运营无比愚蠢，几年前没死给你游苟活到现在真是地球online一大悲哀。
空头支票、出尔反尔，校猫继续卖你的杯子得了，最好附赠你的倒模。

items.title: [正面] This game flourishes on the atmosphere it builds, ...
items.summary: This game flourishes on the atmosphere it builds, and the actual thoughtful gameplay it brings. It has a good story that is somewhat hard to understand at times, but is very good at that bone chilling feeling that Lovecraftian horror often bring with them. Definitely reccomend it if you are looking for slow paced but captivating world.

items.title:
[正面] Eh... with caveats.

The game is excessively gen...
items.summary:
Eh... with caveats.

The game is excessively generous with pulls... because characters and Wheels need 16 dupes to max out.

The excessive generosity with pulls and how easy the game makes it to regularly accrue them resulted in people being able to make selling accounts overseas a real job. Like, accounts worth hundreds of dollars of in-game currency and pulls can be bought for like 80 cents from the SEA region.

Don't take it seriously. Play the story. It's ok.

items.title: [正面] If you like R1999, you might also like this too, g...
items.summary: If you like R1999, you might also like this too, gameplay is a little more advanced, original and dark world crafted with love, maintained with care- this is like a marriage, but its between devs and players

items.title: [正面] (I mainly play on IOS so my playtime on steam is n...
items.summary:
(I mainly play on IOS so my playtime on steam is not indicative of the playtime I actually have). Looking at all the gacha games I've ended up playing over the years, the only ones I've really stuck with have been Arknights, Limbus Company and Morimens. The fact that Morimens tries to set itself apart from its contemporaries through its lovecraft inspired setting and slay the spire type gameplay is its greatest strength. The story has kept me thoroughly engaged and feels worth your time, and that quality is enhanced by the characters in both personality and design. The card based gameplay is reminiscent of slay the spire, but with a bigger emphasis on teambuilding (due to it being a gacha game). 

The game is dupe-centric (meaning you have to get multiple copies of a character to unlock their full potential) but very few characters feel incomplete without many duplicates. The game gives a fair amount of pulls, as well as a free dupe item once a month which can help you complete your roster and put some investment towards characters you enjoy playing. 

The game is also decently challenging, but it has never felt unfair (I have only recently spent some money on the game, so majority of my experience has been F2P). 

If you're looking for a fun card battler or a gacha game that is more focused about the "game" part, I'd highly recommend giving Morimens a chance.

items.summary:
上头的卡牌游戏 克苏鲁风格 roguelite 每局都好玩，1周玩了快60小时。。。福利很好
PVE 算力构筑 对的上xp的 一玩就是天亮了系列
送的和活动给的资源非常多， 主线做做 活动玩玩 ，不氪金游戏自带送的4小只强度很高 搭配很灵活配队不死绑，自由度非常高 ，0氪就能全破 能体验到游戏所有内容，有点追求的 氪完双倍就能爽玩
PVP 对战 纯公平 良心卡牌竞技 ，现在这样的二游卡牌 PVP真不多了
